mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO model_usage_sum (user_id, model_name, period_date, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, reasoning_tokens, cached_tokens, cost, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{usageSum.userId}, #{usageSum.modelName}, #{usageSum.periodDate}, #{usageSum.promptTokens}, #{usageSum.completionTokens}, #{usageSum.totalTokens}, #{usageSum.reasoningTokens}, #{usageSum.cachedTokens}, #{usageSum.cost}, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE prompt_tokens = prompt_tokens + VALUES(prompt_tokens), completion_tokens = completion_tokens + VALUES(completion_tokens), total_tokens = total_tokens + VALUES(total_tokens), reasoning_tokens = reasoning_tokens + VALUES(reasoning_tokens), cached_tokens = cached_tokens + VALUES(cached_tokens), cost = cost + VALUES(cost), update_time = NOW()
